summary: Bulk Update Company Action Plan Template Item Assignees
description: Updates multiple Action Plan Assignees for the selected action plan items

parameters.name: completion_mode
parameters.description: Whether to update what can be or nothing if one can not be updated. Defaults to "all_or_nothing"

is_holding.description: status of the update on that Item

role.description: Role of the Project Action Plan Template Item Assignee to be set

verification_method_id.description: Verification Method ID of the Project Action Plan Template Item Assignee to be set

party_id.description: Party Person ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set

status.description: status of the update on that Item

id.description: The ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee
